title: Inception
description: A skilled thief steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology, but must plant an idea into a CEO's mind.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max teams up with Furiosa to flee from a tyrannical warlord.

title: The Dark Knight Rises
description: Batman comes out of exile to protect Gotham from the formidable terrorist Bane.

title: La La Land
description: An aspiring actress and a jazz musician pursue their dreams while navigating a complex romance in Los Angeles.

title: The Greatest Showman
description: The story of P.T. Barnum and the creation of his circus, celebrating imagination and inclusivity.

title: Get Out
description: A young African-American man uncovers shocking secrets when visiting his white girlfriend's family estate.

title: A Quiet Place
description: A family must live in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household, leading to unexpected consequences.

title: Joker
description: Arthur Fleck's descent into madness transforms him into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

title: Coco
description: A young boy journeys to the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's history and follow his passion for music.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
description: Teen Miles Morales discovers his powers and teams up with Spider-people from other dimensions.

title: Soul
description: A middle school music teacher discovers the meaning of life after an unexpected journey to the afterlife.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble once more to undo Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: Man of Steel
description: Clark Kent discovers his extraterrestrial origins and embraces his destiny as Superman to save humanity.

title: Doctor Strange
description: A brilliant but arrogant surgeon learns the mystic arts to protect the world from magical threats.

title: Wonder Woman
description: Diana, princess of the Amazons, leaves her home to fight alongside men in the war to end all wars, discovering her full powers.

title: Pitch Perfect
description: College student Beca joins an all-female a cappella group and helps them compete in national competitions with her unique style.
